title: Vue.js Slots Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of basic slots, named slots, and scoped slots.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary purpose of a Slot in Vue.js?
options: To pass HTML content or other components from a parent into a child component's template.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the tag name for a slot inside a child component's template?
How do you define multiple slots in a single component?
options: By giving each slot its own unique name using the name attribute.
By repeating the <slot> tag many times.
Only one slot is allowed per component.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the shorthand syntax for the 'v-slot' directive in Vue 3?
Can a child component pass its internal data back to the parent component using a slot?
options: Yes, using what is called a Scoped Slot.
No, slots only flow from parent to child.
